entities.name: inbox_review_generator.py
entities.context: Script that reads unrouted analyses, groups by action type, checks TTL violations, and generates REVIEW.md

entities.name: REVIEW.md
entities.context: Review document generated in Inbox containing summary statistics, TTL warnings, auto-routed files, and suggested routings

entities.name: N5
entities.context: System folder structure containing config and scripts for V's knowledge management

entities.name: Inbox
entities.context: Temporary staging area for files awaiting routing decisions

entities.name: TTL violations
entities.context: Files that have been in Inbox longer than 14 days

entities.name: auto-routing
entities.context: Automatic file routing for high-confidence items (≥85% confidence threshold)

entities.name: confidence thresholds
entities.context: System uses high (≥85%), medium, and low confidence levels to determine routing behavior

relationships.context: Configuration file controls routing behavior and settings
Files in Inbox >14 days trigger TTL warnings
